title: Silver and White Balloons UNOEYSAT Confetti Metallic Balloon 50 Pcs 12 inch as Adult Wedding Birthday Gratuation Party Anniversary Event Decoration
features: Shiny Color: Silver and white balloons UNOEYSAT include a total of 50pcs 12 inch balloons: 15pcs Metallic Silver Balloons, 15pcs Confetti Silver Balloons, 20pcs White Balloons and 1 Roll of 33 feet Balloon Ribbon. The color combination looks very beautiful and elegant. The metallic shine gives the balloons an elegant look. The diameter of an inflated balloon is about 30cm (=12 inches).

Good Quality: Wedding Balloons Silver White are made of high quality natural latex with no toxic chemical composition. They are 100% biodegradable and environmentally friendly. The balloons are not easy to be torn and can last for a long time. The durability with air filling: more 3 days, with helium filling: approx. 4-5 hours, depending on the outside temperature - do not fill with helium the day before!

Silver Confetti Balloons: UNOEYSAT latex balloons support air or helium. A balloon pump is highly recommended. After inflation, rub the confetti balloons on fleece, dry towel or hair, and then shake to make confetti stick to the inside. The filled confetti makes a special impression when you pop the balloons at the end of the party.

Great Party Decorations: 50pcs silver white latex balloons are good enough to make a distinctive heart-shaped backdrop, arch or balloon bouquet. Balloons confetti metallic silver white UNOEYSAT are ideal for weddings, adult's birthdays, bridal showers, baby showers, baptisms, anniversaries, JGA or back-to-school celebrations and any other occasion.

Tips: There is a color difference between the deflated and inflated states of the balloon, but it will be the same as the picture after inflation. Please confirm the color after inflation. A balloon pump (manual or electric) is highly recommended. Please do not inflate the balloons too much. (less than 90%).
description: Elegant party decoration addition UNOEYSAT silver white latex balloons impress with their elegance and give your room a harmonious and festive atmosphere The beautiful and coordinated silver white balloons mixture is perfect wherever a decoration is desired. Ideal for many themes and occasions: Perfect decorations for birthday, wedding, engagement, baby shower, anniversary, starting school, Bachelor party (JGA), glamor party, baptism, communion, confirmation, graduation or Christmas party etc. Specifications: Color: Silver Metallic, Transparent Silver Confetti, Pearl White Material: natural latex, confetti Measurements: 30 cm (12 inches, the maximum diameter) Recommended temperature: 10 to 20 degrees Celsius (have room temperature) Storage : possible up to 1 year (cool and dry, protect from direct sunlight, do not store below 5°C) With air filling: lasts more than 3 days With helium filling: flight time approx. 4-5 hours What do you get? 15 x 12 inch metallic balloons silver 15 x 12 inch confetti balloons silver 20 x 12inch white latex balloons 1 x 33 feet Silver Balloon Ribbon Tips for use: 1. It is very hot outside in summer. We recommend crafting and decorating the balloons indoor.(Better lower than 30 degrees Celsius) 2. Choking hazard: Children under 8 years old can choke on uninflated or burst balloons. Adult supervision is required. 3. Do not fill with helium the day before! Don't fill up too early. Please don't inflate the balloons too much.(less than 90%) 4. Slight color deviations from the illustration are possible.
